description: A geologist creates a 3D model of the different rock types (lithologies) in a deposit, which is fundamental for all other mine planning.

nodes.task_description: Interpret and define the boundaries between different rock types on multiple 2D cross-sections based on drillhole logs.

expected_outcome.expected: The rock type boundaries are digitized on all sections.

nodes.task_description: Create 3D wireframe surfaces for each rock type by linking the interpretations between sections.

expected_outcome.expected: 3D solids representing each rock unit are created.

nodes.task_description: Use the final lithology model to constrain the resource estimate, ensuring grades are only estimated within the correct rock units.

expected_outcome.expected: The resource model is updated and improved by using the new lithology model.
